mapper.sql: SELECT i.id, i.name, i.category, i.unit, i.stock_qty, i.min_stock, i.unit_cost, i.supplier_id, i.created_at, i.updated_at, s.supplier_name AS supplier FROM ingredients i LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON i.supplier_id = s.id AND s.is_active = 1

sql.if: AND i.stock_qty > i.min_stock AND i.stock_qty <= i.min_stock * 1.5

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ingredients (name, category, unit, stock_qty, min_stock, unit_cost, supplier_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{stock_qty}, #{min_stock}, #{unit_cost}, #{supplier_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE ingredients SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, stock_qty = #{stock_qty}, min_stock = #{min_stock}, unit_cost = #{unit_cost}, supplier_id = #{supplier_id} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE purchase_items SET ingredient_id = NULL WHERE ingredient_id = #{id}
